text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What's going on, Shakur? Why did you ask to
borrow my phone earlier?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I put an app I made on it. There, that icon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Huh... "Happy birthday"? Oh, is this perhaps your
birthday present to me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is amazing! There are shiny four-leaf
clovers spreading all over the screen!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The lighting's all programmatically generated.
Those clovers won't wither, and you won't have to
waste time searching for them, either.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aww, but that time I spend searching for them
always becomes a happy memory in the end.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Still, I'm incredibly happy to have these ones
too. I'll treasure the clovers you gave me,
Shakur! ♪
